commands.name: doctor
commands.summary: Check install, auth, API connectivity, and Claude and Codex entry skill and plugin state

commands.name: me
commands.summary: Show the authenticated Baseloop user and active organization

commands.name: tools
commands.summary: Discover, inspect, and execute Baseloop platform tools

commands.name: setup
commands.summary: Install or refresh the Baseloop entry skills and plugins for Claude and Codex, and manage background auto-update

commands.name: upgrade
commands.summary: Update the CLI binary to the latest release and refresh agent setup

commands.name: uninstall
commands.summary: Remove Baseloop local files, PATH entry, install state, and the binary
